changes.value:
## What
Remove all merge-related code that was incorrectly placed in `swissarmyhammer-cli` (the `sah` binary). This code belongs in `kanban-cli` instead.

### Files to delete
- `swissarmyhammer-cli/src/commands/merge/` (entire directory: mod.rs, jsonl.rs, yaml.rs, md.rs)
- `swissarmyhammer-cli/tests/merge_e2e.rs`

### Files to modify
- `swissarmyhammer-cli/src/commands/mod.rs` — remove `pub mod merge;`
- `swissarmyhammer-cli/src/cli.rs` — remove `MergeSubcommand` enum and the `Merge` variant from the main CLI enum
- `swissarmyhammer-cli/src/main.rs` — remove `handle_merge_command()` function and the `merge` match arm
- `swissarmyhammer-cli/src/dynamic_cli.rs` — remove `build_merge_command()` and its registration in `add_server_commands()`
- `swissarmyhammer-cli/Cargo.toml` — remove `swissarmyhammer-merge` dependency if it was added
- `.claude/worktrees/agent-ace7fe88/swissarmyhammer-cli/src/commands/install/components/mod.rs` — remove `GitMergeDrivers` struct, `MERGE_DRIVERS` const, all helper functions (`find_git_dir`, `register_git_merge_driver`, `replace_merge_section`, `unregister_git_merge_driver`, `remove_git_config_section`, `update_gitattributes_add`, `update_gitattributes_remove`), and its registration in `register_all()`

Note: The `GitMergeDrivers` code is in a worktree that may not have been merged. Check if it exists in the main tree first.

## Tests
- `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-cli` — verify nothing breaks
- `cargo check -p swissarmyhammer-cli` — clean compile"}
</invoke>
Remove merge code from sah CLI
